name: Arena PLM & QMS API
what_it_does: Arena (PTC Arena) REST API for cloud-native product lifecycle management (PLM) and quality management system (QMS) platform. Enables AI agents to manage product bill of materials (BOM) data retrieval and version tracking for engineering and manufacturing, handle change order and change request workflow status monitoring, access supplier collaboration and component sourcing data, retrieve product quality and nonconformance record data, manage test and verification record tracking for product compliance, handle approved manufacturer list (AML) and component lifecycle data, access file and document management including CAD files and specifications, retrieve product revision history and comparison data for change impact analysis, manage corrective and preventive action (CAPA) workflow tracking, and integrate PLM and QMS data with ERP, MES, and supply chain systems.
use_cases: Retrieving BOM data from ERP integration agents
Tracking change order status from product development agents
Monitoring quality records from compliance management agents
Accessing supplier component data from procurement agents
not_for: Large enterprise PLM with heavy CAD integration needs (use Windchill/Teamcenter)
Non-electronics manufacturing without electronics supply chain focus
Simple document management without full PLM change workflow requirements
best_when: An electronics manufacturer or hardware startup using Arena PLM wants AI agents to automate BOM synchronization, change order tracking, quality record management, supplier collaboration, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: ENGINEERING RISK: Arena BOM and change order automation affects production builds — automated change approval without engineering review creates incorrect manufacturing builds. Component substitution automation requires engineering qualification validation. Medical device Arena QMS automation must comply with FDA 21 CFR Part 820 QSR before automated QMS decisions.

auth.notes: Arena uses API key (arena_session_token) authentication. Per-workspace credentials. Developer portal at developers.arenasolutions.com. Webhooks for PLM event notifications. REST API with JSON. San Mateo, California HQ. Acquired by PTC (2021, $715M). Cloud-native PLM — no on-premise option. Strong in electronics (PCB, semiconductors, IoT devices).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per workspace
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; user count and module (PLM, QMS) determine pricing
pricing.notes: San Mateo, California. Arena founded 2000. Acquired by PTC (2021, $715M). Cloud PLM and QMS for electronics manufacturing. 1,400+ customers. Strong in SMB electronics, IoT devices, and medical devices. Cloud-native from inception. API-first design. Competes with OpenBOM and Propel for cloud PLM market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; 60 requests/minute default; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: ENGINEERING RISK: Arena BOM and change order actions affect production manufacturing; automated change approval without engineering review creates build errors
Medical device QMS — Arena QMS is used for FDA 21 CFR Part 820 compliance; automated QMS record creation and closure requires validated workflow per QSR requirements
Arena session token auth — authentication uses arena_session_token header (not Bearer); non-standard auth pattern requires careful SDK implementation
Rate limit: 60 req/min — Arena enforces 60 requests/minute; implement rate limiting and queuing for bulk BOM or change operations
Effective date BOM — Arena BOM has effective date versioning; always specify effective date for production BOM retrieval; 'current' BOM without date may include unreleased changes
PTC Arena migration — Arena was acquired by PTC (2021); API and product roadmap evolving under PTC ownership; verify current API documentation at developers.arenasolutions.com
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cloud PLM and QMS. SOC2, ISO13485, 21CFR820. API key. US. Product BOM and quality record data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cloud PLM and QMS. SOC2, ISO13485. API key. US. Product and quality data.
